me llamo.en: my name is, I am called

¿Cómo se escribe?.en: How do you spell it?, How is it written?

¿Qué tomáis?.en: What would you like to eat/drink?

de primero.en: as a starter, for the first course

¿Me cobra/s?.en: Can I pay, please?, The bill, please!

estar situado/-a.en: to be located, to be situated

todo tipo de.en: all kinds of, every kind of

¿Qué días abre?.en: On which days is it open?

Está muy rico/-a..en: It tastes very good. It's delicious.

anotar.en: to note down, to write down

bajar.en: to get off, to get out

seguir.en: to carry on, to keep going

¿Con qué te despiertas tú?.en: What do you wake up to?

apagar.en: to switch off, to turn off

poner la música a tope.en: to turn the music up full blast

a tope.en: to the max, all the way

ducharse.en: to shower, to take a shower

divertirse.en: to have fun, to enjoy oneself

volver a casa.en: to go home, to return home

estar en un atasco.en: to be stuck in a traffic jam

ha empezado.en: it has begun, it has started

¿Cómo se forma el perfecto?.en: How is the perfect tense formed?

¿Cómo quedamos?.en: Where and when shall we meet?

pasar por.en: to come by, to drop by

pasear en globo.en: to go for a hot-air balloon ride

hacer puenting.en: to bungee jump, to go bungee jumping

me parece.en: it seems to me, I think

¿Te apuntas?.en: Are you in? Do you want to join?

¡Es hora de mover el esqueleto!.en: It's time to shake a leg! Time to hit the dance floor!

hacer conciertos.en: to give concerts, to play concerts

durante todo el año.en: all year long, throughout the year

estar en forma.en: to be in shape, to be fit

están hablando por teléfono.en: they are talking on the phone

ir de excursión.en: to go on an excursion, to go on a trip

estar conectado/-a.en: to be online, to be connected

mantener el contacto.en: to keep in touch, to stay in contact

¿Qué haces?.en: What do you do (for a living)?

busco.en: I look for, I search for

tomar.en: to drink, to eat, to have

poder.en: to be able to, can, may

faltar.en: to be missing, to be lacking

en mi casa.en: at my place, at my home
